conservative.name: Cerulean Armour
conservative.requirements: 8 power. Must perform the prepare manoeuvre. If engaged with an enemy, add L to the dice pool

success.description: You cast the spell and the armour flares into existence
As above, and add 2 charge tokens to this card

sigmarsComet.description: While your Cerulean Shield is recharging, you gain access to the Improved Block action regardless of its requirements

challenge.description: Effect: You are girded with crackling magical armour while this spell is recharging which counts as a suit of armor with Soak 3 and Defence 2 that does not interfere with spellcasting. When you are attacked, you may remove 1 recharge token from this card to reroll 1 or in the dice pool (do this only once per attack).
Special: If your Cerulean Shield is recharging, reduce the difficulty modifier by
